review_text:
Nous avons réservé 2 nuits sur un unpowered site
Camping moyen et un peu cher pour la qualité
Pas beaucoup d’arbre donc très peu d’ombre
Il faut payer 1$ par douche de 4 minutes…
Beautiful location , but no camp kitchen so we didnt stay

Disappointed that I had booked powered site but due to error on parks behalf, ended on unpowered only to find that throughout the weekend, there were 3-4 powered sites left vacant.  Amenities were amongst the cabins well away from caravan & camp sites
Really nice manager, friendly people, good take away shop/supermarket, awesome staff at the golf club. You hear the ocean when you sleep. Very family friendly and travel friendly 10/10

Greens Beach is absolutely fabulous and having the shop and golf course add to the experience.
However I found the park lacking. The old amenities are kept clean enough but don't forget your dollar for 4 minutes of hot water.
They only have bore water and don't try boiling it for a cuppa.
No dump point located on site and was told the closest was Beaconsfield 20 minutes away (but don't ask where because they cant tell you) It's actually at the football field which I had to research myself.
No sign of a camp kitchen.
Paying $50 per night with facilities lacking is way too steep.
I travel alone with my dog and really think a single supplement should be considered. I questioned the price when booking and was told he'd see what he could do but charged me top dollar.
I am always very honest with my reviews and hope this is of assistance.
I haven't stayed here yet but it looks fabulous!! The beach is gorgeous!! I'll be back!!
Nice park with easy access to beach, shop, which is incredibly well stocked,  and the West Head Coastal walk. Lovely place to have  a family holiday.
Great caravan park, lovely beach, good walks and a fantastic general store

What a beautiful spot for a holiday wish we could have stayed longer.
Can't fault the place or caretaker.

This is a lively small caravan park with a mixtyif powered and unpowered sites. Facilities are excellent and 50m walk to the beach. Tide beach
Small convenience store and really nice coffee
Golf course is in excellent condition. Some good walking tracks, well worth a visit
great caravan park nice and clean awesome little spot

Polite staff, clean linen, towels, cupboards, table, floor. Comfortable bed. Great pool. Your own car space. Little verandah to have a morning tea/coffee. Pleasant surroundings. Lots for children to enjoy as well. We had a great time, thank you.

Went for the day to see mum and dad at the caravan park. Facilities are very clean and tidy, cost is minimal, shop is walking distance and the beach is massive. Most enjoyable day. I highly recommend anyone to goto Greens Beach area.
Absolutely lovely caravan park.facilities sparkling clean
Greens Beach was a lovely place to stay facilities were very clean. The caretaker was very friendly, and he aimed to please.  We would stay there again.
nice place to stay . but no dump point.  why.  means I cannot go and stay for a week in my motorhome ,or I have to drive to Beaconsfield .
Dean was super helpful and the location was fantastic as we were there for a running event (start line was just outside the caravan park). It would be great to return when the weather was better.

Great place to have a holiday loved the location
Markings for the powered caravan sites need to be set out clearer as pegs were on the ground and neighbouring  caravan was half on our site
What a top park. Dean was a great host with lots of great ideas what to see. Great  position  ,very close to beach.
Great place for day adventures to surrounding area.  Plenty to see.  Dean the park manager is a fantastic help with plenty of local knowledge.  Heaps of bouncers at night.

We had a fantastic albeit short stay in Greens Beach. Sites were large and the facilities immaculately clean. Plenty of wildlife for the kids and the beach is beautiful. Dean provided some great local suggestions for food and adventuring. We look forward to returning for a more leisurely stay.
Great spot to stay. Plenty of space, clean facilities and affordable.

Lovely park to stay at .Definitely
Be back .Toilets and showers very clean. Managers very helpful and cheerful. Lovely little shop just up the road.Beaches Lovely.
